title: How Do I Pay for a Featured Listing?

content:
# How Do I Pay for a Featured Listing?

Selling your car can be a busy time, and sometimes you need that extra push to stand out from the crowd. That's where a featured listing on BuyAndScrap.com comes in! If you're wondering **how do I pay for a featured listing** once you've decided to give your car maximum exposure, don't worry – we've made the process straightforward and secure.

## The Simple Steps to Featuring Your Car

### Getting Your Listing Ready
First things first, you'll need to have your standard car listing created and looking great. Make sure you've uploaded clear, honest photos, written an accurate description, and set a fair price. Once your standard listing is live, you'll see options to upgrade it.

### Choosing Your Featured Option
When you're happy with your basic advert, navigate to your seller dashboard or the specific listing page for your car. Here, you'll be presented with various upgrade options, including different tiers of featured listings. Each option will clearly outline its benefits and costs (you can learn more on our [/your-listing-options](/your-listing-options) page). Pick the one that best suits your needs and budget.

### How Do I Pay for a Featured Listing on BuyAndScrap.com?
Once you've selected your desired featured upgrade, you'll be guided to our secure payment portal. We aim to make this as simple and quick as possible, so you can get back to selling your car!

## Secure Payment Options You Can Trust

### Card Payments Made Easy
At BuyAndScrap.com, we primarily accept all major debit and credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Maestro, etc.). Our payment gateway is encrypted, meaning your card details are completely safe and secure. Simply enter your card number, expiry date, and the CVV/security code when prompted. You might also go through a quick 3D Secure verification process (like 'Verified by Visa' or 'Mastercard SecureCode') to add an extra layer of protection, which is standard practice for online payments in the UK.

### What Happens After Payment?
As soon as your payment is successfully processed, your featured listing will usually go live almost instantly! You'll receive a confirmation email, and your car will start benefiting from that extra visibility, often appearing higher in search results and in dedicated featured sections across our site.

## A Quick Recap: How Do I Pay for a Featured Listing?

In essence, paying for a featured listing on BuyAndScrap.com involves creating your basic ad, choosing your featured upgrade, and then completing the payment securely via debit or credit card. It's a smooth process designed to get your car noticed without any hassle.

We believe in making car selling as straightforward and effective as possible. Upgrading to a featured listing is a fantastic way to attract more buyers, and knowing **how do I pay for a featured listing** should now be clear and easy. Get your car seen today!
